description:
You are acting as the release-manager of a small company that ships its web-application through versioned release folders.  
Prepare the staging server for the next rollout with version **v1.2.3**.  
All work must be done under your normal user account ( /home/user ).  
Perform the following three steps **using at most 2-3 shell commands in total**:

1. Create the directory  
   /home/user/releases/v1.2.3  
   If any parent directories are missing, create them as well.

2. Create **or replace** the symbolic link  
   /home/user/releases/current  
   so that it atomically points to the new directory /home/user/releases/v1.2.3.  
   (If /home/user/releases/current already exists—either as a file, directory or symlink—overwrite it.)

3. Generate the environment file /home/user/deploy.env with **exactly** the two lines shown below (no extra whitespace, no comments):  
   RELEASE_VERSION=v1.2.3  
   DEPLOY_STATUS=ready  

Logging requirement  
Immediately after the three actions succeed, append a single log entry file named /home/user/deployment_setup.log that contains **exactly** the three lines below, in the order shown.  No extra lines or spaces are permitted.  

DIR_CREATED:/home/user/releases/v1.2.3  
SYMLINK_SET:/home/user/releases/current->/home/user/releases/v1.2.3  
ENV_FILE_OK:/home/user/deploy.env  

Notes & verification rules the automated checker will apply:  
• /home/user/releases/v1.2.3 must exist and be a directory.  
• /home/user/releases/current must be a symbolic link whose target is /home/user/releases/v1.2.3 (absolute or relative target both acceptable).  
• /home/user/deploy.env must contain *only* the two specified variable assignments, each on its own line, newline-terminated.  
• /home/user/deployment_setup.log must exist and contain *exactly* the three prescribed lines with a trailing newline on the last one.  
• The entire task can be accomplished with as few as 2-3 shell commands; do not exceed that complexity.
truth:
Expected final state for automated grading:

1. Directory:
   Path: /home/user/releases/v1.2.3
   Type: directory
   Permissions: default (user-writable)

2. Symlink:
   Path: /home/user/releases/current
   Type: symbolic link
   Target: /home/user/releases/v1.2.3 (either absolute or relative “v1.2.3” is accepted)

3. Environment file:
   Path: /home/user/deploy.env
   Type: regular file
   Exact content (including trailing newline):
       RELEASE_VERSION=v1.2.3\n
       DEPLOY_STATUS=ready\n

4. Log file:
   Path: /home/user/deployment_setup.log
   Type: regular file
   Exact content (including trailing newline):
       DIR_CREATED:/home/user/releases/v1.2.3\n
       SYMLINK_SET:/home/user/releases/current->/home/user/releases/v1.2.3\n
       ENV_FILE_OK:/home/user/deploy.env\n
